name: US.ContPortThroughput
Title: Container port throughput, annual (analytical)
Keywords: ship, maritime, transport, container, port, throughput, TEU
Author: UNCTAD
Notes:
Description:

This table presents the estimated total number of containers handled, per country, expressed in twenty-foot equivalent units (TEUs). A TEU represents the volume of a standard 20 feet long intermodal container used for loading, unloading, repositioning and transshipment. A 40-foot intermodal container is counted as two TEUs.

Sources:
UNCTAD secretariat based on data collected by various sources, including

  • Dynamar B. V.,
  • Professor Jean-Paul Rodrigue, Dept. of Maritime Business Administration, Texas A&M University – Galveston.

The above-mentioned data collectors, in turn, source their data from a variety of port authority reports and other industry sources. The collected data may in some cases depend on the ultimate source consulted.

Notes:

Data published are country totals which may conceal the fact that some minor ports are not included. The data includes container port throughput for ports with time series that are complete since 2010 or that can be made complete by repeating an observation for a maximum of four years after the original observation. This means that country level time series are comparable over time but that the coverage of ports may differ between countries. UNCTAD continuously seeks to improve coverage in updates to this table. Ports included are noted in the country notes.

Repeated port level observations are treated as estimates and country level figures that are made up of more than 20 per cent estimates are noted as such. Observations, where more than 40 per cent of the country level container port throughput is estimated, are not published but included in the group level totals. Revisions of more than 20% from the previous version of this statistical table are also noted. Notes and cell suppressions are only applied for individual economies.

For any questions related to the country data and methodology, please contact the Review of Maritime Transport team at: unctad-rmt@un.org.
